reviews.review_title: Good but need more punch And Fix things
reviews.review_description:
Good game. Needs esential fixes. Mst times, you can't  move in the starting room. You have to try hard for the laser to reach the board to enable Smooth Locomotion. Then when you  select your desired like Smooth motion and Snap turn, when you enter the rooms, snap turn most times is replaced by smooth turn and again, Smooth locomotion will not work, so you can't move.  
Tested again just now. It seems when you choose Snap turn and you go into the Freeplay room, Snap turn turns into Smooth Rotate. OR there will be no Turn at all. Can you fix that? Only way fix that you cant move is exit room and reenable

Also in the Free play room,  once you get it to work by exitin the room and reselect Smooth Locomotion from board, and snap turn or whatever you want( may not work when you enter the room..it may turn to smooth turn even if you choose snap turn) but anyways, once you go into that test room. It's pretty cool. But you can only spawn a few. 
Hammer physics very weird.please fix.


#2. The Challenges: They cool but the items you have to break are little, there's not a lot to break. & let us use the hammer etc not just bat.

a. Tea Party room. There's only 4 little things to break: Teapot, a teacup, the plate for the teacup and the table. uhhhh... i don't see how that's enough to unleash your rage. Would be nice to have the whole room to be filled with stuff to break and maybe make some customization available too after it gets a bit repetitive. Like changing Colors of things. and positions. or add more objs from freeplay.

b. Launch Yard. It's a bit boring. All you do is push a button and sacks come flying to you and you aim with the bat and it's pretty easy to complete . that's fine. The you could have fun if there were things to break all around the Yard, the remainings debree from the launched stuff do not even break apart anymore, and are. Would be cool if there were Trees, wood fences to break Etc. 
Lastly game lacks fun cause there's no music. Add ability use mp3.

developer_response.body: Hey @extensiveGamerZ3, really appreciate the detailed feedback. A lot of good points here, and definitely things that are on our radar. Thanks for taking the time to play Smash Room and share your thoughts.
